-- 1 of 4 --

In this lesson, I’ll teach you the exact process of
how Quad Lock comes up with new products. You’ll
get to see how each of the strategies and methods I
taught you in this module ultimately come together.
Quad Lock’s Product Process
• 	Validated the market
• 	Validated a new product
• 	Determined flagship/onboarding product vs.
complementary product
• 	Decided on pricing strategy
• 	Conducted customer survey
LESSON:
QUAD LOCK: A CASE STUDY
MODULE:
PRODUCT
SUCCESS FORMULA
(CREATING NEW SKUS)
“Always be learning and looking for opportunity.” 	ACTION ITEMS
❏ 	Write down three things you can be doing better
with your product and start improving them
tomorrow.
